title: Inspect technical quality of work in an automotive workplace
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Inspect technical quality of work in an automotive workplace demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Gather information to carry out inspection

pcs.text: Quality inspection specifications and tolerances are accessed and analysed1.2 Equipment and materials required to support inspection are identified and prepared 1.3 Options for inspection methods are analysed and those most appropriate to the situation are selected and prepared1.4 Inspection information is sourced and interpreted
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Quality inspection specifications and tolerances are accessed and analysed1.2 Equipment and materials required to support inspection are identified and prepared 1.3 Options for inspection methods are analysed and those most appropriate to the situation are selected and prepared1.4 Inspection information is sourced and interpreted?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Quality inspection specifications and tolerances are accessed and analysed1.2 Equipment and materials required to support inspection are identified and prepared 1.3 Options for inspection methods are analysed and those most appropriate to the situation are selected and prepared1.4 Inspection information is sourced and interpreted.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Gather information to carry out inspection

elements.title: Inspect work

pcs.text: Work to be inspected is identified and confirmed according to workplace procedures2.2 Inspections of work are conducted at regular intervals and according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures, and coordinated with other workplace activities according to workplace quality systems and procedures2.3 Faults or non-compliances identified are reported to supervisor according to workplace procedures2.4 Documentation, including non-compliance report, is completed accurately according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Work to be inspected is identified and confirmed according to workplace procedures2.2 Inspections of work are conducted at regular intervals and according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures, and coordinated with other workplace activities according to workplace quality systems and procedures2.3 Faults or non-compliances identified are reported to supervisor according to workplace procedures2.4 Documentation, including non-compliance report, is completed accurately according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Work to be inspected is identified and confirmed according to workplace procedures2.2 Inspections of work are conducted at regular intervals and according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures, and coordinated with other workplace activities according to workplace quality systems and procedures2.3 Faults or non-compliances identified are reported to supervisor according to workplace procedures2.4 Documentation, including non-compliance report, is completed accurately according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Inspect work

elements.title: Make recommendations

pcs.text: Corrective action to be carried out is agreed and authorised by the responsible supervisor 3.2 Quality improvements and recommendations are communicated to supervisor according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Corrective action to be carried out is agreed and authorised by the responsible supervisor 3.2 Quality improvements and recommendations are communicated to supervisor according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Corrective action to be carried out is agreed and authorised by the responsible supervisor 3.2 Quality improvements and recommendations are communicated to supervisor according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Make recommendations

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
